title: Ravinte Hardware 5 Pack Cabinet Pulls - 5 Inch (128mm) Hole Center, Matte Black Handles for Kitchen Drawer & Cupboards, Black Solid Heavy Duty Cabinet Hardware, 6 Inch Overall Length
features: Easy Installation: The kitchen cabinet pulls come with the necessary screws (1 inch screws and 1-3/4 inch breakaway screws) for easy installation.

Solid Construction: The handles for cabinets and drawers are made from zinc alloy, that can withstand wear and tear, it is resistant to corrosion and rust, the pulls can maintain their appearance over time.

Dimension: Overall Length:6 inch(154MM); Hole Centers(CC):5 inch(128MM); Width:9/16 inch(15MM); Projection:1-3/32 inch(28MM). Fits most cabinets,but please make sure the existing holes center spacing (center to center) in the cabinets door and drawer is 5 inch.

What's in the set: It including 5 PCS matte black kitchen pulls for cabinets and furniture. And each kitchen cabinets handles come with 2 PCS 1 inch screws and 2 PCS 1-3/4 inch breakaway screws. The screw size is M8-32.
Worry-free : Try these handles for cabinets and drawers with confidence. If you're not satisfied, return them for replacement or a full refund within 365 days.
description: The heavy duty kitchen pulls is a robust and durable handle designed to provide a sturdy grip for opening and closing cabinets, drawers, closet, cupboard, drawer, dresser, door or wardrobe. These pulls are typically made of zinc alloy, and are designed to withstand the daily wear and tear of frequent use. The cabinet pulls provide a secure grip to open cabinets and drawers easy, ensure easy and reliable access to cabinets and drawers, even with frequent and heavy use. Whether you are renovating your kitchen or simply looking to upgrade your cabinet hardware, the solid kitchen pulls are the perfect choice.
